finding: a judgment of moral objectivity versus relativism shifted depending on the cultural distance of the evaluated target
no reliable difference—participants lacked context-dependent intuitions that philosophers had attributed to them
folk metaphysical judgments about causation diverge from philosophical theoretical predictions
